channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Plastic barriers partially blocking footpath, 30th March
item.description:
For around two years, I believe, three plastic barriers have been obstructing the foot path on the east side of Copt Elm Road. They were erected over a yellow plate which we thought was covering a missing manhole cover but they have recently been moved aside to lean against the fence revealing a drain cover in place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Copt Elm Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: Bridleway damaged, 30th March
item.description:
You didn't bother fixing the problem last time. It's dangerous, it's damaged, it's illegal. Please do something instead of closing the task without resolution.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Blenheim Orchard, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public right of way blocked, 30th March
item.description:
Residents of 18, 20 & 22 Milliner Crescent have put up illegal signs and bought speed bumps to put them on a public road, claiming the road to be a private driveway when it is not. This road has the right of way for all vehicles & pedestrians. They have taken things into their own hands and claimed the road to be just theirs but anyone can drive down this road and access both ends of the through road if they wish. They have also put wooden flower planters up in the middle of the road to stop people accessing that part of Milliner Crescent. They have put up signs saying "no through road" and "private driveway" which is untrue, it is not a private driveway, it's a public through road that anyone can use. They need to take down these illegal signs and take up the speed bumps as they are not council approved and the council did not put these down. There are a total of 4 speed bumps all within a very small distance of just 9 meters! - which is just unheard of. This is dangerous for all

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milliner Crescent, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked between Casino and Paparitos, 30th March
item.description:
Drain been blocked for weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 218, High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still NO bus shelters on Cheltenham Road Longlevens, 30th March
item.description:
Following the Cycle Path being completed last year we still do not have any bus shelters at Greyhound Gardens. I see that new bus shelters have been erected in Churchdown along with a new dedicated bus stop and bus lane at Pirton Lane. Please can advise when we can expect to have our bus shelters on Cheltenham Road. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nine Elms Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The recent a40 closure forced heavy traffic through the village for 4 months and many verges are ruined, 30th March
item.description:
Outside number 13 and 12 the verge has been depleted and the warning bollards broken. The traffic has also degraded the stones at the bottom of my drive which need resetting. so the verge needs rebuilding amend appropriate bollards warning signs added. I reported this before and you replied it had been fixed!! Please speak to me directly if you need more info

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road needs repaving in entirety, 30th March
item.description:
The road surface is no longer here. This has been reported numerous times. Please do not (again) tell me this problem has been resolved when it has not. Please repave this road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate is damaged/missing/locked problem, 30th March
item.description:
Caller reports the gate on this PROW path has been replaced by a style. Disabled user cannot access path. Caller reports that it looks like 2 scaffolding poles have been attached.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose drain cover causing loud noise day and night, 30th March
item.description:
Outside/near 1 Yew Tree Road, Gloucester, on Lobleys Drive, near the junction of Yew Tree Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The junction of Hucclecote Road with the A417 in the direction of Ermin Street is lettered with potholes of varying sizes., 30th March
item.description:
Turning left from the A417 heading south in to Hucclecote Raod which becomes Ermin Street, the potholes are dispersed at the corner and on the road/bridge over Valiant Way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th March
item.description:
Remove broken lime branch from off road and dead wood tree at the same time. (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 30th March
item.description:
BGG was felling the tree outside number 5 Vittoria walkand it has now caused damge to number 7 Vittoria Walk - brickset driveway and the bricksets have been brought up and broken, customer is unsure if he is able to drive on the driveway. Contractors are BGG
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signs & bollards left in road on the corner of a busy junction, 30th March
item.description:
Corner of Cheltenham Road East & Parton Road. Several big signs blown down in road & bollards in the road all left behind from the seven Trent road works which happened on the week end of 28/29March. Very dangerous as you have to drive on other side of the junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Flytipping, 30th March
item.description:
Located against the flyover upright, behind the crash barrier on the A417 Gloucester bound. A variety of items which is growing weekly, it seems to be someone's preferred dumping spot. Bags of waste and other items No photo as there is nowhere to stop and photograph.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth Bypass, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another map error, 30th March
item.description:
Really, does a child draw these paths?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Mill Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Map error, 30th March
item.description:
What is going on with the map here? looks like someone has been trying to draw feathers -paths that all lead to the same place next to one another with no start point - get it right?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 30th March
item.description:
Perm repair 43118921....Could you raise a perm repair enquiry for above job at GROVEFIELD EWAY - Cheltenham EMER OOH Ringway Emergency - Large pothole opposite MAyfield Villa. USRN 6701362 ( E ) 390840 ( N ) 221058
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on pavement, 30th March
item.description:
Dog's mess on pavement outside Yates's pub.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on footpath., 30th March
item.description:
Significant amoutn of broken glass at ///sometime.extend.tolerates
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foul smell in lane., 30th March
item.description:
Outside Byways / The Willows. Gravel Walk. Smell is quite potent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Walk, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
